allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add mobile-friendly controls and responsive design

Features:
- Touch control buttons for mobile devices
- Swipe gestures on canvas
- Responsive canvas that scales on mobile
- Optimized layout for phone screens
- Prevent zoom and improve touch handling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add premium game juice effects and power-up system

Phase 1 Features:
- Particle explosion system with physics
- Screen shake effects on impacts and eating
- Score popup animations (+10 floating text)
- Power-up system: Shield, Ghost, Speed, Magnet
- Pulsing food and power-ups with glow effects
- Visual indicators for active power-ups
- Ghost mode allows passing through walls
- Shield protects from collisions
- Enhanced visual feedback throughout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add multiple game modes and combo system

Phase 2 Features:
- Mode selection screen with 4 game modes
- Classic Mode: Traditional endless gameplay
- Time Attack Mode: 60-second challenge
- Survival Mode: 3 lives with progressive difficulty
- Zen Mode: No walls, relaxing flow gameplay
- Combo system: Earn multipliers for quick eating (up to 5x)
- Progressive speed increase in Survival mode
- Mode-specific high scores saved separately
- Lives system for Survival mode
- Timer display for Time Attack mode
- Visual feedback for combos
- Enhanced game over screen with mode stats

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add visual themes, settings menu, and sound effects

Phase 3 Features:
- 5 visual themes: Classic, Neon Cyberpunk, Retro 8-bit, Dark Mode, Ocean
- Theme selection system with live preview
- Settings menu with gear icon
- Sound effects system using Web Audio API
- Sounds for eating, power-ups, death, and UI interactions
- Sound toggle switch in settings
- Theme and sound preferences saved to localStorage
- Dynamic color system for snake, food, and UI
- Smooth theme transitions
- Professional settings UI with animations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
